capabilities.description: Interactive browser automation and remote UI manipulation.
Mutating external systems through provider-authenticated actions.
Read-only file preview, listing, and inspection operations.
Filesystem mutation operations such as create, delete, copy, and rename.
Read-only information lookup, diagnostics, calculation, and text utility operations.
Read-only access to inboxes, message history, or other message content.
Outbound messaging and notification delivery with observable side effects.
Read-only network fetch and external information retrieval.
